sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ لَيْلَى صَوْتًا غَرِيبًا فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Leila je čula čudan zvuk noću.
sentences.translationEn: Layla heard a strange sound in the night.
The sound was coming from the kitchen.

sentences.translation: Ustala je iz kreveta i tiho hodala.
sentences.translationEn: She got up from the bed and walked quietly.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْ بَابَ الْمَطْبَخِ وَرَأَتِ الْقِطَّةَ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorila je vrata kuhinje i vidjela mačku na stolu.
sentences.translationEn: She opened the kitchen door and saw the cat on the table.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَتْ لَيْلَى وَأَخَذَتِ الْقِطَّةَ إِلَى غُرْفَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Leila se nasmijala i odnijela mačku u svoju sobu.
sentences.translationEn: Layla laughed and took the cat to her room.
